issues.description: Missing passive effect for the condition-based ability: 'If you have 7 or more cards in your trash, this Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects and gains [Blocker]'. This is a static/passive effect that should be represented separately from the OnPlay trigger.

TrashFromHand should use 'thenActions' only if conditional; the card text says 'You may trash 1 card', suggesting optional choice. Current structure implies mandatory trash before KO option, which is correct, but clarify intent.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have 7 or more cards in your trash, this Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects and gains [Blocker]. [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 5 or less.
